title.en: Google Introduces Device Bound Session Credentials to Protect Browser Cookies
title.zh: Google 推出设备绑定会话凭证，强化浏览器 Cookie 安全防护

summary.en: Google's security team has published details on Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC), a new web platform security mechanism that cryptographically binds browser cookies to a specific device using hardware-backed keys. DBSC addresses cookie theft attacks where stolen session cookies are replayed from other machines, a common attack vector against web applications. The proposal builds on existing secure enclave hardware already present in modern devices and is designed for eventual standardization as a web platform primitive. It is a significant step forward for authentication security on the web.
summary.zh: Google 安全团队发布了设备绑定会话凭证（DBSC）的详细介绍，这是一种新的 Web 平台安全机制，通过硬件密钥将浏览器 Cookie 与特定设备进行加密绑定。DBSC 解决了 Cookie 被盗后在其他设备上重放的攻击问题，这是针对 Web 应用的常见攻击向量。该提案基于现代设备中已有的安全飞地硬件，并被设计为未来标准化的 Web 平台原语，是 Web 身份验证安全的重要进步。

title.en: Microsoft Suspends Dev Accounts for High-Profile Open Source Projects
title.zh: 微软暂停多个知名开源项目的开发者账户

summary.en: Microsoft has suspended the developer accounts of contributors to several high-profile open source projects, reportedly as part of a coordinated policy action. The suspensions affected maintainers of major projects hosted on GitHub, raising concerns about platform dependency risk for critical open-source infrastructure. The incident re-ignited debate about the risks of relying on a single corporate platform for open source hosting and the need for resilient, decentralized alternatives. The story gathered 349 Hacker News upvotes and 116 comments.
summary.zh: 微软暂停了多个知名开源项目贡献者的开发者账户，据报道此举是某项协调政策行动的一部分。被暂停的账户涉及 GitHub 上托管的重要项目维护者，引发外界对关键开源基础设施平台依赖风险的担忧。此事再次点燃了关于依赖单一企业平台进行开源托管风险的讨论，以及构建更具韧性的去中心化替代方案的必要性。该报道在 Hacker News 获得 349 个赞和 116 条评论。

title.en: France Launches Government-Wide Linux Desktop Plan as Windows Exit Begins
title.zh: 法国政府启动全国性 Linux 桌面迁移，正式开启脱微软之路

summary.en: France's government has announced a national plan to migrate public sector desktops from Windows to Linux, as part of a broader push for digital sovereignty and reducing dependency on extra-European tech companies. The initiative covers central government agencies and signals one of the largest Western government Linux migrations to date. The announcement was driven by concerns over geopolitical software dependencies and long-term security supply chain risks. It gathered over 768 Hacker News upvotes, reflecting wide interest from the developer community in government open-source adoption.
summary.zh: 法国政府宣布推行全国性公共部门桌面从 Windows 迁移至 Linux 的计划，这是推动数字主权、减少对欧洲以外科技公司依赖的更大战略的一部分。该举措涵盖中央政府机构，是迄今规模最大的西方政府 Linux 迁移行动之一。公告背后的驱动力来自对地缘政治软件依赖和长期安全供应链风险的担忧，在 Hacker News 获得逾 768 票赞，开发者社区对政府层面的开源采用表现出浓厚兴趣。

title.en: Simon Willison: OpenAI Voice Mode Runs on a Much Older, Weaker Model
title.zh: Simon Willison：OpenAI 语音模式背后是更旧、更弱的模型

summary.en: Developer and researcher Simon Willison highlighted a non-obvious reality about OpenAI's voice mode: it runs on a significantly older and weaker model than the latest text-based ChatGPT. Users who interact with AI through voice may assume they're accessing the most capable model, but the voice pipeline relies on a different, less powerful model due to latency and real-time constraints. Willison's observation sparked discussion about how model capability perception differs across modalities and the technical trade-offs involved in real-time AI voice interfaces.
summary.zh: 开发者和研究者 Simon Willison 揭示了 OpenAI 语音模式的一个不为人知的事实：它使用的模型比最新文本版 ChatGPT 明显更旧、更弱。通过语音与 AI 交互的用户可能以为在使用最强大的模型，但受限于延迟和实时性要求，语音流水线实际依赖一个不同的、性能较低的模型。Willison 的观察引发了关于不同模态下模型能力感知差异以及实时 AI 语音接口技术权衡的广泛讨论。

title.en: Claude Code Best Practice Guide Hits 35K Stars with 1,248 Daily Gain
title.zh: Claude Code 最佳实践指南以 1248 日增星冲至 35K

summary.en: A community-maintained repository of Claude Code best practices has reached over 35,000 GitHub stars with 1,248 new stars in a single day. The project aggregates community-sourced tips, workflows, and patterns for getting the best results from Claude as a coding agent. Its rapid growth follows the viral success of the andrej-karpathy-skills repository, reflecting a broader community movement to crowdsource and codify effective AI coding agent behavior. The momentum underscores growing consensus around specific prompting and workflow strategies for AI-assisted development.
summary.zh: 一个社区维护的 Claude Code 最佳实践仓库已累计超过 35000 颗 GitHub 星，单日新增 1248 颗。该项目汇集了社区贡献的使用技巧、工作流和模式，旨在最大化 Claude 作为编码 Agent 的效能。其快速增长紧随 andrej-karpathy-skills 仓库的病毒式传播，折射出社区众包并标准化有效 AI 编码 Agent 行为的更大浪潮，也表明特定提示词与工作流策略在 AI 辅助开发领域已逐渐形成社区共识。

title.en: Microsoft's markitdown Surges 2,353 Stars in One Day Amid AI Pipeline Adoption
title.zh: 微软 markitdown 单日涨星 2353，AI 流水线采用势头迅猛

summary.en: Microsoft's markitdown, a Python library for converting various file formats including Office documents, PDFs, and images to Markdown, surged 2,353 GitHub stars in a single day to reach nearly 99,000 total. The massive spike likely reflects growing adoption in AI and RAG pipelines where Markdown is a preferred format for feeding documents into LLMs. It represents one of the largest single-day star gains for a Microsoft open source project in recent memory, signaling that document-to-Markdown conversion has become a core infrastructure need in the AI application stack.
summary.zh: 微软开源 Python 库 markitdown 单日新增 2353 颗 GitHub 星，总量逼近 99000。该库用于将 Office 文档、PDF、图片等多种格式转换为 Markdown。这波爆发式增长很可能源于 AI 和 RAG 流水线中对 Markdown 作为文档喂入 LLM 格式的日益采用。这是微软开源项目近期单日涨星最多的案例之一，表明文档转 Markdown 已成为 AI 应用栈中的核心基础设施需求。

title.en: FBI Recovered Deleted Signal Messages via iPhone Notification Data
title.zh: FBI 借助 iPhone 推送通知数据，成功恢复已删除的 Signal 消息

summary.en: A new report reveals that the FBI was able to recover deleted Signal messages by exploiting iPhone notification data, specifically the push notification metadata stored by Apple. Signal messages, while encrypted in transit, leave notification-related traces in iOS systems that law enforcement was able to leverage. This discovery has significant implications for end-to-end encryption assumptions and highlights how metadata at the device OS level can undermine application-level privacy guarantees. The report received 338 Hacker News upvotes and 162 comments.
summary.zh: 最新报道揭示，FBI 通过利用 iPhone 推送通知数据（即苹果存储的推送通知元数据），成功恢复了已删除的 Signal 消息。Signal 消息在传输过程中经过加密，但在 iOS 系统中会留下与通知相关的痕迹，执法机构正是利用了这一点。这一发现对端对端加密假设具有重要影响，揭示出设备操作系统层级的元数据如何能够颠覆应用层面的隐私保障。该报道在 Hacker News 获得 338 个赞和 162 条评论。

title.en: OpenAI Backs Illinois Bill to Limit AI Lab Liability for Model Harm
title.zh: OpenAI 支持伊利诺伊州法案，寻求限制 AI 公司对模型危害的法律责任

summary.en: OpenAI is backing an Illinois state bill that would significantly limit when AI companies can be held legally liable for harms caused by their models. The legislation would exempt AI labs from liability in many harm scenarios, raising concerns from civil liberties groups and researchers about corporate accountability in AI. Critics argue the bill would shield AI companies from consequences just as more powerful AI systems are being deployed in high-stakes domains. The story received 358 Hacker News upvotes and 255 comments, reflecting broad concern about AI governance.
summary.zh: OpenAI 正在支持一项伊利诺伊州法案，该法案将大幅限制 AI 公司因其模型造成危害而承担法律责任的场景。该立法将在许多危害情形下豁免 AI 实验室的责任，引发公民自由团体和研究人员对 AI 企业问责制的担忧。批评者认为，该法案将在更强大的 AI 系统大规模应用于高风险领域之际，为 AI 公司提供免责保护。该报道在 Hacker News 获得 358 个赞和 255 条评论，反映出社区对 AI 治理的广泛关切。

title.en: Claude Code Pro Max 5x Quota Exhausted in 1.5 Hours Despite Moderate Usage
title.zh: Claude Code Pro Max 5x 配额 1.5 小时内耗尽，用量并不激进

summary.en: Users on Claude Code Pro Max tier are reporting that their 5x quota is being exhausted in as little as 1.5 hours despite moderate usage, drawing 395 Hacker News upvotes and 326 comments. The GitHub issue thread documents widespread frustration, with developers unable to complete a full workday on the Pro Max plan. Multiple users report unexpectedly high token consumption that does not align with their perceived usage levels. The incident raises serious questions about Anthropic's usage accounting methodology and whether the Pro Max quota structure is viable for professional daily use.
summary.zh: Claude Code Pro Max 层级用户反映，尽管使用强度属于适度水平，5x 配额却在短短 1.5 小时内耗尽，该话题在 Hacker News 获得 395 票赞和 326 条评论。GitHub issue 线程记录了大量开发者的不满，许多人无法在 Pro Max 方案下完成一整天的工作。多名用户报告实际 token 消耗远超预期。此次事件令外界对 Anthropic 用量计算方式及 Pro Max 配额结构能否满足专业日常使用产生严重质疑。

title.en: everything-claude-code: Agent Harness Optimization System Hits 152K Stars
title.zh: everything-claude-code：Agent Harness 优化系统突破 15.2 万星

summary.en: The "everything-claude-code" repository, a comprehensive agent harness performance optimization system for Claude Code featuring skills configurations, behavioral instincts, and workflow enhancements, has amassed 152,000 GitHub stars. The project systematically improves Claude Code's reliability and task performance through curated harness configurations, addressing the unpredictability that many developers experience with vanilla Claude Code. Its massive adoption signals that the developer community is actively engineering structured behavioral layers on top of Claude Code to improve outcomes on complex tasks. This represents a growing meta-layer ecosystem built specifically to tune and extend AI coding agents.
summary.zh: "everything-claude-code" 仓库是一款为 Claude Code 量身打造的全面 Agent Harness 性能优化系统，涵盖技能配置、行为直觉及工作流增强，目前已累积 15.2 万 GitHub 星。该项目通过精心设计的 Harness 配置系统性提升 Claude Code 的可靠性和任务表现，解决了大量开发者在使用原生 Claude Code 时遭遇的不可预测性问题。如此大规模的采用表明，开发者社区正在积极为 Claude Code 构建结构化行为层，以优化复杂任务的执行效果。这代表了一个专门用于调优和扩展 AI 编码 Agent 的元层生态系统的兴起。

title.en: claw-code: Rust AI Coding Agent Codebase Finally Open-Sourced at 182K Stars
title.zh: claw-code：Rust AI 编码 Agent 代码库终于开源，累积 18.2 万星

summary.en: The "claw-code" repository by ultraworkers, described as "The fastest repo in history" and a previously private Rust-based AI coding agent codebase, has been publicly unlocked and reached 182,000 GitHub stars while trending globally. The message "The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party!" signals that this was a highly anticipated open-source release from a project that had been kept private. Its exceptional star count in Rust reflects accumulated community demand from developers awaiting access to this codebase. The release represents a major addition to the high-performance, Rust-based AI coding agent ecosystem.
summary.zh: ultraworkers 的 "claw-code" 仓库——一个基于 Rust 的 AI 编码 Agent 代码库，被描述为历史上最快的仓库——日前正式解锁并开源，已累积 18.2 万 GitHub 星并登上全球热门榜。终于解锁了，开派对吧！的描述表明，这是一次社区期待已久的开源发布，此前代码库一直保持私有。其在 Rust 生态的超高星量折射出开发者对该代码库访问权限的长期积累需求。此次发布为高性能 Rust 系 AI 编码 Agent 生态再添重磅一员。

title.en: ByteDance deer-flow: Open-Source Long-Horizon SuperAgent Harness at 60K Stars
title.zh: 字节跳动 deer-flow：开源长周期 SuperAgent Harness 突破 6 万星

summary.en: ByteDance's deer-flow, an open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness capable of sustained research, coding, and writing across complex multi-step tasks, has reached 60,000 GitHub stars and is trending on GitHub. The framework is built for production-grade autonomous agents that need to maintain context and execute coherently over extended workflows. With ByteDance's backing, it brings enterprise engineering standards to the open-source SuperAgent space, competing with offerings from Anthropic, LangChain, and independent research groups. Its rapid adoption reflects developer interest in enterprise-grade, open-source alternatives to proprietary managed agent platforms.
summary.zh: 字节跳动的 deer-flow 是一款能够在复杂多步骤任务中持续研究、编码和写作的开源长周期 SuperAgent Harness，目前已突破 6 万 GitHub 星并登上热门榜。该框架专为需要跨扩展工作流维持上下文并连贯执行的生产级自主 Agent 而设计。凭借字节跳动背书，它将企业级工程标准带入开源 SuperAgent 领域，与 Anthropic、LangChain 及独立研究团队的同类框架展开竞争。其快速增长折射出开发者对企业级开源替代方案相对于专有托管 Agent 平台的强烈兴趣。

title.en: oh-my-openagent: Popular Agent Harness Rebrands from oh-my-opencode at 50K Stars
title.zh: oh-my-openagent：热门 Agent Harness 从 oh-my-opencode 品牌重塑，累积 5 万星

summary.en: The "oh-my-openagent" repository, previously known as "oh-my-opencode," has rebranded from a coding-focused agent to a broader general-purpose agent harness, reaching 50,000 GitHub stars on GitHub Trending. The rename from "opencode" to "openagent" signals the project's deliberate expansion beyond code generation toward general autonomous agent capabilities. With 50,000 stars in TypeScript, it represents a significant community-built alternative to proprietary agent harnesses. The rebrand mirrors the industry-wide transition from narrow coding agents to general-purpose autonomous agent frameworks.
summary.zh: "oh-my-openagent"（前身为 "oh-my-opencode"）已完成品牌重塑，将定位从编码专属 Agent 拓展为更广泛的通用 Agent Harness，在 GitHub 热门榜上累积了 5 万颗星。从 "opencode" 到 "openagent" 的更名标志着该项目有意突破代码生成范畴、迈向通用自主 Agent 能力。凭借 TypeScript 生态的 5 万颗星，它成为社区构建的专有 Agent Harness 重要替代方案。此次品牌重塑与行业从单一编码 Agent 向通用自主 Agent 框架转型的大趋势高度呼应。

title.en: Cloudflare and OpenAI Launch Agent Cloud for Enterprise AI Workflows
title.zh: Cloudflare 与 OpenAI 联手推出企业级 AI Agent Cloud

summary.en: Cloudflare has partnered with OpenAI to bring GPT-5.4 and Codex to its Agent Cloud platform, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with built-in speed and security. The integration combines Cloudflare's global edge infrastructure with OpenAI's latest models, offering a turnkey environment for agentic workflows. This positions Cloudflare Agent Cloud as a first-class platform for enterprises that want to run AI agents close to users with zero-trust security and low latency.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 与 OpenAI 合作，将 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入其 Agent Cloud 平台，使企业能够快速构建、部署和扩展面向真实业务的 AI Agent，同时内置速度与安全保障。此次集成将 Cloudflare 的全球边缘基础设施与 OpenAI 最新模型相结合，为 Agent 工作流提供开箱即用的环境。这使 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 成为企业在靠近用户侧、以零信任安全和低延迟运行 AI Agent 的一流平台。

title.en: Josh Comeau: Applying Disney's Squash-and-Stretch to SVG Micro-Interactions
title.zh: Josh Comeau：用迪士尼压缩拉伸原理打造 SVG 微交互动效

summary.en: Josh Comeau has published a new tutorial exploring Disney's first principle of animation — squash and stretch — and how it can be applied to create SVG micro-interactions that feel natural and believable. The piece walks through practical techniques for adding organic motion to UI elements, demonstrating how a small animation detail can have an outsized impact on perceived quality. It is a well-crafted resource for frontend developers looking to elevate their interfaces with motion design fundamentals.
summary.zh: Josh Comeau 发布新教程，探索迪士尼动画第一原则——压缩与拉伸——如何应用于创建自然、可信的 SVG 微交互动效。文章详细讲解了为 UI 元素添加有机动态效果的实用技巧，展示了一个小小的动画细节如何对感知质量产生巨大影响。对于希望运用动效设计基础知识提升界面品质的前端开发者，这是一份精心制作的学习资源。

title.en: Cloudflare Launches Managed OAuth for AI Agent Authentication
title.zh: Cloudflare 推出 Managed OAuth，让 AI Agent 安全访问内部应用

summary.en: Cloudflare announced Managed OAuth for Access, enabling AI agents to securely navigate internal applications by authenticating on behalf of users via RFC 9728. It eliminates the need for insecure service accounts while giving agents properly scoped access. This solves a fundamental challenge of how autonomous agents interact with protected internal resources, marking a significant step toward enterprise-grade AI agent security.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 推出 Managed OAuth for Access，让 AI Agent 能够基于 RFC 9728 代表用户安全访问内部应用，无需使用不安全的服务账号即可为 Agent 提供适当范围的权限。这解决了自主 Agent 如何与受保护内部资源交互的根本性挑战，是 AI Agent 企业级安全的重要里程碑。

title.en: Google Launches Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS with Granular Audio Control and 70 Languages
title.zh: Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：支持精细音频控制与 70 种语言

summary.en: Google released Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, a next-generation text-to-speech model with granular audio control across 70 languages.
summary.zh: Google 发布了 Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS，下一代文本转语音模型，支持精细音频控制，覆盖 70 种语言。

title.en: Cloudflare Announces Project Think: Next-Gen Platform for Persistent AI Agents
title.zh: Cloudflare 发布 Project Think：面向持久化 AI Agent 的下一代平台

summary.en: Cloudflare announced Project Think, a next-gen platform for persistent AI agents with long-term memory and tool calling.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 发布 Project Think，为 AI Agent 提供持久化运行能力，支持长期记忆和跨会话状态保持。
